wikitext.*:
The Quests tab has multiple things going on. In top to bottom order: *Monthly - this includes a picture for the current [[Seasonal Events|seasonal event]], then claiming the current event rewards, then the current [[Goal Challenges|goal challenge]] if any, and the current [[Seasonal locations|seasonal location]], if any. *Daily Quests earn 25 [[Rainbow Stones]]. *Weekly Milestones can earn 20, 50 or 100 stones. *Special Quests earn 100 stones. ==Monthly "quests"== A picture at the top of the tab features the current [[Seasonal Events|Seasonal Event]] outfits. Below that, there are buttons to: *Claim rewards from the current seasonal event. *Option to join and track the current month's [[Goal Challenges|Goal Challenge]], if any *Occasionally, there is an option to go to a [[Seasonal locations|seasonal location]], which will have 14 days of story events. ==Daily Quests== [[File:Dailyquestexamples.jpg|thumb]] Daily quests are small things that can be accomplished easily. After you finish one, a "Claim" button will appear for you to get your reward. You get '''25 rainbow stones''' for each daily quest you finish. Some are related to in-game items, such as "Change one interior item" or "Change [your pet's] outfit." Others are self-care related, such as "Repeat an affirmation 3 times," which has a link to an affirmation. Some have opportunities for in-game journaling ([[Reflections]]), such as "Practice Gratitude". Or there may be an activity such as "[[Name Your Emotion]]", or a [[Breathe|Breathing]] exercise, etc. Additional examples: *Send [[Good Vibes]] to a friend. *"Complete a goal" just means do one of your goals from your Home tab list. *"Send [your pet] on an [[Adventuring|Adventure]]", which will happen when you achieve full [[Energy]].
*[[Answer with friends]] is a new feature which asks a question and lets you choose from multiple answers. When you claim the reward, the quest is crossed through, but it still has an arrow you can click to see how your friends answered! If you already did something on the list, the game will credit it here, but you need to click "Claim" to get your rainbow stones. ==Weekly Milestones== [[File:Weeklymilestones.png|thumb]]Weekly milestones track the number of times in a week that you have completed a goal within a [[Self-care Areas|Self-care Area]] (SCA for short.) The milestones are for completing a single goal in a SCA - you don't need to complete all of them, and it doesn't have to be the same goal every day. If you have checked off at least one such goal for two days, you get '''20 rainbow stones'''. If you complete one in the same SCA for four days, you get '''50 stones''', and if you make it 6 days you get '''100 stones'''! Even better, you can get these awards for each SCA you have! There is a little animation each time you claim a reward. ==Special Quests== These quests show your birb's advancement in the game. Most come along slow and steady as you play; they aren't things to rush out and do in a few seconds. There are six ongoing Special Quests, with a slider showing your progress to the current goal. Finishing a goal level gives you '''100 stones''' to claim, and you get a new goal. (''Note the counts below are incomplete where ellipses ... are shown, please add more to the page.'') [[File:Specialquestsexamples.jpg|thumb]] *Collect (#) pieces of clothing: 1, 5, 10, 20, 50, 75, 100, 150, 200, 300, 400, 500, 750, 1000, 1200, 1500, 2000, 2500, 3000, 4000, 5000, 10000 *Obtain (#) decorations: 1, 5, 10, 20, 50, 75, 100, 150, 200, 300, 400, 500, 750, 1000, 1200, 1500, 2000, 2500, 3000, 4000, 5000, 10000 *Meet # [[Micropets]]: 1, 3, 5, 8, 11, 15, 20, 40, 60, 100, 125, ... 150 *Visit # [[Locations]]: 2, 3, 5, 7, ... 13, ... 20, .... 25, 27 (current max) *Evolve your birb to the next [[Stages of Growth|Stage of Growth]] by doing Adventures: Toddler (7), Child (22), Teen (42), Adult (67) *Become ([[Friendship]] level) with your birb. Do this by getting Friendship points: 2, 4, 8, 15, 30, 40, 80, 165, 340, 730. There are 10 named [[Friendship]] levels, from Pals to Uber Soulmates, and they require a bigger jump in friendship points each time. Getting friendship points to grow friendship levels can happen passively as you go on adventures etc. Or you can actively pat your birb, which is explained on the [[Friendship]] page. It takes about 15 pats to get ONE friendship point towards a level. [[Category:Finch: Self Care Pet App]]
